race.comment: TAKEOVER LAD (3) got things straight back on track last start when beaten a lip after leading them up. Peak fitness now and gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claimer engaged. OVER THE EDGE (2) knuckled down strongly to get within a length of the winner in third last start over 1300m at Penola. Has the blinkers removed and is expected to be well found again by the market despite the tricky draw. GRINZINGER ACE (1) failed in town last time but had put two good runs together prior. Willing to give another chance. ROYAL TRAPEZE (5) is mixing his form but boasts peaks that stack right up. Has a wide alley to overcome but is among the main chances.
